de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class ProgVarReplaceVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.ProgVarReplaceVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class ProgVarReplaceVisitor
extends CreatingASTVisitor
    Walks through a java AST in depth-left-first-order. This visitor replaces a number of program variables by others or new ones.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor

        CreatingASTVisitor.DefaultAction

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ProgVarReplaceVisitor(ProgramElement st, java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable> map, boolean replaceall, Services services)
      creates a visitor that replaces the program variables in the given statement
      ProgVarReplaceVisitor(ProgramElement st, java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable> map, Services services)
      creates a visitor that replaces the program variables in the given statement by new ones with the same name

    • Constructor Detail

      • ProgVarReplaceVisitor

        public ProgVarReplaceVisitor(ProgramElement st,
                             java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable> map,
                             Services services)
        creates a visitor that replaces the program variables in the given statement by new ones with the same name
        Parameters:
        st - the statement where the prog vars are replaced
        map - the HashMap with the replacements
        services - the services instance

      • ProgVarReplaceVisitor

        public ProgVarReplaceVisitor(ProgramElement st,
                             java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable> map,
                             boolean replaceall,
                             Services services)
        creates a visitor that replaces the program variables in the given statement
        Parameters:
        st - the statement where the prog vars are replaced
        map - the HashMap with the replacements
        replaceall - decides if all variables are to be replaced
        services - the services instance
